prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of an elegant adult Japanese woman standing on a traditional wooden veranda beside a classic Japanese house. She has a short, smooth dark-brown bob haircut, fair skin, soft natural makeup, and a calm, slightly wistful expression while gazing off to the right of the camera. She wears a fitted white sleeveless wrap-style dress with thin straps, a deep V neckline, gathered fabric at the bust, a defined waist, and a long body-hugging skirt with subtle realistic wrinkles. Her pose is relaxed: one hand resting on the wooden railing to the right, the other arm hanging naturally at her side, shoulders angled slightly toward the viewer. The setting includes wooden sliding doors and beams on the left, a rustic veranda railing on the right, lush green garden foliage, and a traditional tiled roof softly blurred in the background. Use soft natural daylight, shallow depth of field, warm wood tones, realistic skin texture, high-detail fabric folds, cinematic bokeh, and an 85mm portrait-lens look. Composition should be waist-to-knee/full upper-body framing in a tall 9:16 aspect ratio, with the subject centered slightly left and the background gently out of focus. Keep the image tasteful, fashion editorial, realistic, and polished, with no text, no watermark, and no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of an elegant adult Japanese woman standing on a traditional wooden veranda beside a classic Japanese house. She has a short, smooth dark-brown bob haircut, fair skin, soft natural makeup, and a calm, slightly wistful expression while gazing off to the right of the camera. She wears a fitted white sleeveless wrap-style dress with thin straps, a deep V neckline, gathered fabric at the bust, a defined waist, and a long body-hugging skirt with subtle realistic wrinkles. Her pose is relaxed: one hand resting on the wooden railing to the right, the other arm hanging naturally at her side, shoulders angled slightly toward the viewer. The setting includes wooden sliding doors and beams on the left, a rustic veranda railing on the right, lush green garden foliage, and a traditional tiled roof softly blurred in the background. Use soft natural daylight, shallow depth of field, warm wood tones, realistic skin texture, high-detail fabric folds, cinematic bokeh, and an 85mm portrait-lens look. Composition should be waist-to-knee/full upper-body framing in a tall 9:16 aspect ratio, with the subject centered slightly left and the background gently out of focus. Keep the image tasteful, fashion editorial, realistic, and polished, with no text, no watermark, and no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级垂直肖像，主角是一位优雅的成年女性 日本女性，她站在传统日式房屋旁的木质缘侧上。她留着顺滑的深棕色短波波头，皮肤白皙，妆容自然柔和，神情平静且略带一丝忧郁，目光望向镜头右侧。她穿着一件修身的 白色 无袖裹身裙，带有细肩带、深 V 领口、胸部褶皱设计、收腰剪裁，以及带有细腻真实褶皱的长款修身裙摆。她的姿势放松：一只手搭在右侧的木质栏杆上，另一只手臂自然垂在身侧，双肩略微朝向观众。场景包括左侧的木质推拉门和横梁、右侧质朴的缘侧栏杆，以及背景中虚化柔和的葱郁花园植被和传统瓦屋顶。采用柔和的自然日光、浅景深、温暖的木质色调、真实的皮肤纹理、高细节的布料褶皱、电影级焦外成像，以及 85mm 人像镜头的视觉效果。构图应为腰部至膝盖/上半身全景，采用 9:16 的高比例画幅，主体略微偏左居中，背景柔和虚化。保持画面高雅、时尚编辑风格、真实且精致，不要包含任何文字、水印或额外的人物。
